name: LAN-Orangutan
description: LAN Orangutan is a lightweight, self-hosted network scanner for homelabs. It discovers devices via nmap, supports persistent device labeling, grouping and notes, multiple networks and Tailscale peers, and provides a web dashboard plus a full CLI with JSON/CSV export.

notes.text: The web interface has no built-in authentication. Do not expose it outside your LAN without a reverse proxy providing authentication.
Device data is stored in /var/lib/lan-orangutan. The CLI is available inside the container via the orangutan command.
